tests.scenario: Play free session without an account
steps: Launch the application as a guest
Navigate to a session marked as 'Free'
Tap the play button
tests.expected_result: The audio session starts and plays to completion without displaying a payment prompt.

tests.scenario: Play free session with a newly created account
steps: Create a new user account and skip payment setup
Navigate to a session marked as 'Free'
Tap the play button
tests.expected_result: The audio session starts and plays to completion without displaying a payment prompt.

tests.scenario: Verify lock icons on premium content
steps: Log in as a free user
Navigate to the main content library
Scroll through the list of available sessions
tests.expected_result: All content requiring a premium subscription displays a distinct lock icon on its thumbnail.

tests.scenario: Verify instant pricing display on locked content
steps: Log in as a free user
Tap on a session displaying a lock icon
tests.expected_result: The premium subscription pricing details display immediately without navigating to a separate billing screen.

steps: Start an 8 hour sleep audio track
Minimize the application to background mode
Wait for 8 hours
tests.expected_result: The audio continues playing for the full 8 hours without interruption.

steps: Start an 8 hour sleep audio track
Press the device's physical power button to turn off the screen
Wait for 8 hours
tests.expected_result: The audio continues playing for the full 8 hours without interruption.

tests.scenario: Watch app playback stability over 60 minutes
steps: Launch the application on a connected wearable device (a watch)
Start a meditation session longer than 60 minutes
Monitor the device for 65 minutes
tests.expected_result: The audio plays continuously past the 60-minute mark without crashing or timing out.

steps: Download a session to the wearable device
Disconnect the wearable from the phone's Bluetooth connection
Start the downloaded session on the wearable
tests.expected_result: The session plays successfully to completion independently of the phone.

steps: Log in as a premium subscriber
Navigate to Account Settings
Navigate to Manage Subscription
tests.expected_result: A 'Cancel Subscription' button is clearly visible within two taps from the main Settings menu.

steps: Navigate to Manage Subscription
Click the 'Cancel Subscription' button
Confirm the cancellation prompt
tests.expected_result: The subscription is cancelled immediately without requiring the user to navigate through multiple 'Save Offer' popups.

steps: Successfully cancel a premium subscription
Simulate the arrival of the next billing cycle date
tests.expected_result: The system does not process any charges to the user's saved payment method.

steps: Successfully cancel a premium subscription
Log out and log back into the account
Navigate to payment settings
tests.expected_result: The autopay toggle remains in the 'Off' position and does not automatically reactivate.

steps: Note the user's current daily streak number
Start and fully complete a 5 minute meditation session
Return to the profile page
tests.expected_result: The 'Daily Streak' counter increments by exactly one.

tests.scenario: Do not increment streak on incomplete session
steps: Note the user's current daily streak number
Start a 5 minute meditation session
Abort the session after 1 minute
Return to the profile page
tests.expected_result: The 'Daily Streak' counter does not increment.

tests.scenario: Filter search by exact narrator name
steps: Navigate to the search bar
Enter a specific narrator's name
Execute the search
tests.expected_result: The search results display only content narrated by or featuring the searched name.

steps: Search for a narrator
Click the 'Follow' button next to their profile
Navigate to the user's profile settings
tests.expected_result: The narrator is added to the user's followed list and notification preferences are updated.

steps: Navigate to App Settings
Toggle 'Minimalist Mode' to ON
Return to the home screen
tests.expected_result: All gamification elements, streak banners, and promotional popups are completely removed from the UI.

steps: Navigate to App Settings
Toggle 'Minimalist Mode' to OFF
Return to the home screen
tests.expected_result: Gamification elements, streak counters, and standard UI elements reappear.

tests.scenario: Direct content access for returning users
steps: Log in as a returning user
Force close the application
Relaunch the application
tests.expected_result: The application lands directly on the content home screen without displaying a subscription upsell page.

tests.scenario: Verify absence of full-screen popups on launch
steps: Ensure the user account has a previously active history
Launch the application
tests.expected_result: The user is not blocked by a 'Full Screen' subscription offer and can immediately access categories.

steps: Simulate an auto renewal charge on the account occurring 24 hours ago
Navigate to Manage Subscription
tests.expected_result: A 'Request Refund' button is clearly visible and functional.

steps: Simulate an auto renewal charge on the account occurring 72 hours ago
Navigate to Manage Subscription
tests.expected_result: The 'Request Refund' button is disabled, hidden, or directs the user to standard customer support.

steps: Download an audio track to the device's local storage
Enable Airplane Mode on the device
Navigate to downloads and play the track
tests.expected_result: The audio track plays to completion without requiring an internet connection.

steps: Download an audio track to local storage
Start playing the track while connected to Wifi
Turn off the Wifi connection mid playback
tests.expected_result: The audio track continues to play to completion without buffering or crashing.
